hero_section.heading: We're changing the way people learn
hero_section.subheading: OghmaNotes empowers students and professionals to take better notes, stay organized, and learn more effectively. Our AI-powered platform transforms how you capture and manage knowledge.

mission_section.heading: Our mission
mission_section.paragraph_1: At OghmaNotes, we believe that better note-taking leads to better learning. Our mission is to provide students and professionals with intelligent tools that make capturing, organizing, and retaining information effortless and effective.
mission_section.paragraph_2: Whether you're in the classroom, attending lectures, or conducting research, OghmaNotes adapts to your workflow. With AI-powered insights, seamless Canvas integration, and intuitive organization, we're transforming how the world takes notes and learns.

features_section.heading: Powerful features
features_section.intro: Everything you need to take better notes and learn more effectively.
features_section.feature_1_description: Get intelligent summaries, key takeaways, and smart suggestions as you take notes.
features_section.feature_2_description: Auto-sync assignments, deadlines, and course materials directly from Canvas.
features_section.feature_3_description: Auto-categorize notes, tag content intelligently, and find anything in seconds.
features_section.feature_4_description: Access your notes on desktop, tablet, or phone with full offline support.

logo_cloud_section.heading: Trusted by students and educators worldwide

team_section.heading: Meet our team
team_section.intro: We're a dynamic group of individuals who are passionate about what we do and dedicated to delivering the best results for our clients.
team_section.member_1_description: Full-stack engineer building scalable web applications with modern architectures and robust database design.
team_section.member_2_description: Full-stack engineer leading technical strategy, infrastructure management, and performance optimization across the platform.
team_section.member_3_description: Full-stack engineer contributing across frontend and backend features with focus on code quality and user experience.

blog_section.heading: From our blog
blog_section.intro: Learn from our experts and community on note-taking, learning, and productivity.
